title: 📜 Why This Works:
content:
📜 Why This Works:
✔ A fully built-out game system that exists alongside the academic class.
✔ Players (students) have full agency over their progression.
✔ Everything is accounted for in a structured format.

📜 4. Instructor’s Game Master Control Sheet – Hidden Rolls & Mechanics

🚀 This is your personal master control document—where all hidden mechanics, XP tracking, and secret rolls happen.

✔ A. Secret Rolls & Weekly Triggers
• Rolling for Observer’s Passive Effects
• Rolling for Secret Curses & Buffs
• Determining Hidden Game Events & Narrative Twists

✔ B. XP & Faction Tracking
• Live XP leaderboard & unlock tracking
• Faction-based progression & shifting alliances
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 431 (chunk 431/555)
